tldr_zh: OpenAI推出GPT-Live語音模型、微軟Xbox大幅重組、Meta開發錄影智慧眼鏡，AI與科技產業面臨重大調整。
tldr_en: OpenAI launches GPT-Live voice model, Microsoft restructures Xbox division, Meta develops always-recording smart glasses amid major AI and tech industry shifts.

items.title_zh: OpenAI發布GPT-Live語音模型，對話更自然
items.title_en: OpenAI Introduces GPT-Live Voice Model for Natural Conversations
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出新一代語音模型GPT-Live，現已整合到ChatGPT語音功能中。該模型設計更像真人對話，減少打斷用戶，允許用戶在停頓時繼續說話。研究主管Kundan Kumar稱其為公司最先進的語音模型。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launches GPT-Live, a new generation voice model now powering ChatGPT Voice, designed to feel like talking to another person. The model interrupts less and allows users to pause mid-conversation. Research lead Kundan Kumar calls it the company's most advanced voice model.

items.title_zh: OpenAI分析揭露SWE-Bench Pro編碼基準存在重大缺陷
items.title_en: OpenAI Reveals Major Flaws in SWE-Bench Pro Coding Benchmark
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布分析報告，指出流行的編碼基準SWE-Bench Pro存在可靠性和準確性問題。這項研究引發對AI模型評估方法的廣泛關注，突顯了建立準確基準的重要性。
items.summary_en: OpenAI releases analysis revealing critical issues in SWE-Bench Pro, a popular coding benchmark, raising concerns about reliability and accuracy in AI model evaluation. The findings highlight the importance of establishing accurate benchmarks for AI assessment.

items.title_zh: OpenAI與沃爾頓基金會推動K-12教育工作者AI技能培訓
items.title_en: OpenAI Academy Brings Practical AI Skills Training to K-12 Educators
items.summary_zh: OpenAI Academy與沃爾頓家族基金會合作，推出AI技能研討會（AI Skills Jams）計畫，幫助小學至高中教育工作者習得實用AI技能用於課堂教學。此舉旨在加速AI在教育領域的應用。
items.summary_en: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation launch AI Skills Jams to help K-12 educators develop practical AI skills for classroom use. The initiative aims to accelerate AI adoption in education.

items.title_zh: Meta開發全天錄影智慧眼鏡，可持續拍照蒐集視覺數據
items.title_en: Meta Develops Always-Recording Smart Glasses with Continuous Photo Capture
items.summary_zh: 據《金融時報》報導，Meta正開發名為「超感知」的全天候錄影智慧眼鏡原型機。該眼鏡可持續錄製音訊並每幾秒拍攝一張照片，用戶可詢問Meta AI分析這些數據，但此舉引發隱私顧慮。
items.summary_en: Financial Times reports Meta is developing "super sensing" always-on smart glasses that continuously record audio and capture photos every few seconds. Users can ask Meta AI questions about captured content, raising significant privacy concerns.

items.title_zh: Microsoft大幅重組Xbox業務，裁員3200人調整遊戲開發策略
items.title_en: Microsoft Slashes Xbox Division with 3,200 Layoffs, Shifts Development Priorities
items.summary_zh: 作為Xbox「重置」計畫的一部分，Microsoft宣布裁員3200人並關閉多家遊戲工作室。黑曜石工作室被迫放棄《Avowed》轉向開發新《輻射》遊戲，反映公司聚焦高優先度項目的戰略調整。
items.summary_en: Microsoft announces massive Xbox restructuring with 3,200 layoffs and studio closures. Obsidian Entertainment cancels multiple projects including 'Avowed' to focus on new Fallout title, signaling strategic shift toward higher-priority initiatives.

items.title_zh: Elon Musk與SEC達成150萬美元和解，結束Twitter持股披露爭訟
items.title_en: Elon Musk Settles SEC Case with $1.5M Payment Over Twitter Stake Disclosure
items.summary_zh: 法官批准Elon Musk與美國證管會達成的150萬美元和解協議。此案源於Musk收購Twitter時的股權披露問題，該訴訟持續多年，最終以罰款告終。
items.summary_en: Judge approves Elon Musk's $1.5 million settlement with the SEC over his Twitter stake disclosure violations. The settlement concludes a years-long dispute regarding Musk's failure to properly disclose his growing stake in the company.

items.title_zh: SpaceXAI發布Grok 4.5大語言模型，成本更低效能相當
items.title_en: SpaceXAI Releases Grok 4.5 as Cheaper, More Efficient Alternative to Claude Opus
items.summary_zh: Elon Musk旗下SpaceXAI發布新版Grok 4.5，Musk稱其達到「Opus級」水準。新版本承諾提供更便宜且高效率的替代方案，與其他強大AI模型競爭。
items.summary_en: SpaceXAI releases Grok 4.5, which Elon Musk describes as an 'Opus-class model'. The new version promises a cheaper and more efficient alternative to competing powerful AI models.

items.title_zh: 美國FTC強制令：John Deere用戶獲得設備維修權
items.title_en: FTC Settlement Grants John Deere Owners Right-to-Repair Their Equipment
items.summary_zh: 美國聯邦貿易委員會達成協議，保障John Deere用戶的設備維修權。此案彰顯修復權運動的重大勝利，迫使農機製造商放寬維修限制。
items.summary_en: FTC settlement ensures John Deere owners gain right-to-repair their own equipment. The landmark agreement represents a major victory for right-to-repair advocates, forcing the agricultural equipment maker to ease repair restrictions.

items.title_zh: Brown大學教授驗證AI作弊，面試考試成績暴跌50%
items.title_en: Ivy League Professor Confirms AI Cheating, In-Person Exam Scores Drop 50%
items.summary_zh: Brown大學教授懷疑學生使用AI作弊，改為舉辦現場面試考試，成績隨即下滑50%。此事突顯AI工具在教育環境中造成的學術誠信挑戰。
items.summary_en: Brown University professor suspects AI cheating, switches to in-person final exam, and sees scores plummet 50%. The incident highlights serious academic integrity challenges posed by AI tools in educational settings.

items.title_zh: Google支付25萬美元修補Linux重大漏洞，允許虛擬機逃逸
items.title_en: Google Pays $250K Bug Bounty for Critical Linux VM Escape Vulnerability
items.summary_zh: Google為兩項Linux高危漏洞付費25萬美元，這些漏洞允許未授權用戶取得root權限並逃逸虛擬機環境。此舉凸顯雲端基礎設施安全的重要性。
items.summary_en: Google awards $250K bug bounty for critical Linux vulnerabilities allowing guest VM escapes. The flaws permit untrusted users to gain root privileges, highlighting cloud infrastructure security risks.

items.title_zh: 中國試射潛射核飛彈，提升「核武三角」能力
items.title_en: China Demonstrates SLBM Capability, Enhancing Nuclear Triad Threatening US
items.summary_zh: 中國向太平洋試射可搭載核彈頭的潛射洲際彈道飛彈，美國前國防官員指出此舉代表中國已完成空射、陸射、潛射三位一體核武體系，主要針對美國。此舉加劇美中戰略競爭。
items.summary_en: China tests submarine-launched ballistic missile with nuclear capability in Pacific. US former defense officials note this completes China's nuclear triad (air, land, sea), primarily targeting America, intensifying strategic competition.

items.title_zh: 美國對伊朗發動新一波空襲，沿海多地傳爆炸聲
items.title_en: US Launches New Airstrikes Against Iran, Multiple Explosions Reported
items.summary_zh: 伊朗官媒報導美國發動新一波空襲，伊朗沿海多地傳出爆炸聲。此舉標誌美伊軍事對抗升級，國際局勢持續緊張。
items.summary_en: Iranian state media reports new US airstrikes with explosions heard across Iranian coastal areas. The attacks mark escalation in US-Iran military confrontation amid heightened regional tensions.
